---
title: "The Limits of Scale — A Book"
description: "A 7-chapter exploration of why AI is hitting the walls of compute, memory, precision, and learning efficiency."
date: 2026-07-01
categories: [Book]
---

[A 7-chapter exploration of why AI is hitting the walls of compute, memory, precision, and learning efficiency](../my-book/ch1.html){.newsletter-btn}

This book examines the constraints that shaped modern AI infrastructure — from scaling laws to memory hierarchies, precision requirements, and the real cost of training.

**[Start Reading →](../my-book/ch1.html)**
